repo.description: A Java library for reversibly obfuscating numerical identifiers (e.g. 1234 ↔ 4TQCNTL)

terms.context_snippet: ID Obfuscator is a Java library for obfuscating numerical identifiers. Practically, that means taking a number like "17" and transforming it into a string like "GDJSHCX" (and, presumably, turning that string back into a number later).
